Balance Sheet — Q3 2023: As of September 30, 2023, total assets were $78.4 million, including $14.2 million in cash and short-term investments. Total liabilities stood at $22.6 million, of which $8.1 million represents long-term debt. Shareholders' equity increased to $55.8 million, reflecting retained earnings growth from the profitable first three quarters. The current ratio of 3.1 indicates a strong short-term liquidity position.
